Rome and Katie will have to fight the mob and the city to find a way to be together. Will they make it out alive? About Shain Rose S hain Rose writes romance with an edge. Her books are filled with angst, steam, and emotional rollercoasters that lead to happily ever afters. She lives where the weather is always changing with a family that she hopes will never change.
